description: Fix null reference bug in GetSettingValue
goal: Fix GetSettingValue to handle missing settings without crashing
expected_behavior: GetSettingValue should check if the setting object is null before accessing .Value. Return empty string when setting does not exist.
hints: Use '$IsObject(setting) to check if NameIdxOpen returned a valid object
NameIdxOpen returns "" (not an object) when the record doesn't exist
Return not Quit — clearer for a method with an early exit

metadata.source: Replaced external-dep version; same null-check pattern
metadata.author: objectscript-coder
